intelligence.hypothesis: Insufficient telemetry; awaiting next valid capture.

compositional_truth_check.reconciliation_notes: The biome is currently in a state of near-total biological collapse or extreme dormancy. The expected specimens (P1-P4) are not visible as healthy, identifiable plant matter.

inventory_reconciliation.P3_Pothos: Systemic Loss (White rabbit anchor present, but host plant is absent)

plant_audit.P1: No foliage detected. Soil surface appears dark and featureless.
plant_audit.P2: No foliage detected. Pot appears empty.
plant_audit.P3: White rabbit anchor remains, but the Pothos specimen is missing or entirely withered.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Appears dark, potentially moist, but lacks any visible organic growth.
biome_observations.surface_debris: White rabbit figurine is the only non-soil object present. No fungal blooms or incidental sprouts detected.
biome_observations.lighting_impact: The cool spectrum LED is highlighting the textures of the soil but failing to illuminate any living plant tissue.

temporal_deltas.EARLIEST_to_T-1: Significant loss of the single green sprout observed in the EARLIEST image. The biome transitioned from a state of minimal growth to total absence.
temporal_deltas.T-1_to_CURRENT: Static. No recovery or change in the state of the soil or the rabbit anchor.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently non-viable. The disappearance of the sprout seen in the earliest image suggests either rapid senescence, mechanical removal, or total burial in the substrate.
anomalies: White rabbit anchor is isolated in an empty pot
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a catastrophic loss of the botanical specimens. In the earliest image, a single green sprout was visible in the foreground pot. By T-1, this sprout had vanished, and the current state confirms a complete lack of vegetative presence across all pots. The environment is currently a collection of empty containers and a single decorative anchor.
